findings.title: Full-suite green evidence is not a genuine passing run artifact
findings.description: gates.json points the bun-test-full-suite gate at this greenRunPath, but the file contains only the Bun version header and EXIT:0. It does not show the `bun test` command discovering or passing the suite, so the required durable red-before-green pair for the CI `bun test` gate is incomplete. A live reviewer run of `bun test` did pass, but the machine-checked evidence path itself is still stub-like and must be regenerated with the real passing output.
